title: Loan Underwriting: A debt service coverage ratio (DSCR) of less than 1...
summary: Assess the implications of a DSCR below one for debt coverage ability.
prompt: A debt service coverage ratio (DSCR) of less than 1 indicates that a property is generating enough income to cover its debt payments.
solution: A DSCR of less than 1 indicates that the property is not generating enough income to cover its debt obligations, which signifies potential financial distress. Understanding DSCR is vital for assessing investment risk.
